response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, seasoned engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, and backend systems, including genuine high-throughput work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and recent AI-tooling exposure. However, the role is a Principal IC6 position centered on experimentation platforms, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, and statistical analysis — none of which appear in the resume. There is no evidence of building measurement or experimentation systems used across teams, no multi-workstream technical leadership at enterprise scale, and most recent roles are product-focused senior/staff IC work at small companies rather than platform architecture spanning organizations.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend stacks
Real low-latency, high-scale systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, open-source authorship, teaching/workshops, and recent AI-agent/MCP tooling
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience
No demonstrated principal-level scope: leading multi-team initiatives or platforms adopted across an organization
Limited evidence of data/statistical analysis, metrics design, or telemetry infrastructure ownership

key_factors.factor: Gap to Principal/IC6 scope and cross-team leadership
Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale exposure
